title: Bridge Essay: Oceanic states of consciousness-an existential-neuroscience perspective.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Emptiness** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Emptiness — dissolution of self, DMN decoupling, ego dissolution, nondual awareness.

**Oceanic states of consciousness-an existential-neuroscience perspective.**. Front Hum Neurosci.. PMID: 40860325. DOI: 10.3389/fnhum.2025.1653801. Oceanic states of consciousness-characterized by ego dissolution, unity, and timelessness-have long occupied aliminal space between psychopathology and transcendence. This paper explores these states through the interdisciplinary lens of existential neuroscience, integrating insights from psychoanalysis, existentialism, affective neuroscience, and psychedelic research.
